steps.t: Rhiangar has asked you to trace Luilloth's final footsteps to Sarch Vorn. The way there is unknown to her, but she suspects the Ranger Gorwen may know…
Sarch Vorn can be found west of Gerwyn's convoy in Cardolan, built into a hill of black stone. You should meet Gorwen at the entrance to Sarch Vorn in…
Gorwen can be found near the entrance to Sarch Vorn. Sarch Vorn can be found west of Gerwyn's convoy in Cardolan, built into a hill of black stone. Yo…
Luilloth's remains or some other sign of her adventures long ago can likely be found somewhere in Sarch Vorn. You should search for some sign of Luill…
Luilloth can be found in Sarch Vorn. You have discovered Luilloth's remains animated by some fell spirit within the depths of Sarch Vorn. You should f…
Gorwen can be found in Sarch Vorn. You have freed Luilloth's remains from the control of the Grey Fear. You should talk to Gorwen.
Gorwen can be found in Sarch Vorn. You have banished the Grey Fear. You should talk to Gorwen.
Luilloth's chamber can be found in Sarch Vorn. After banishing the Grey Fear, Gorwen has heard a sound echoing from the halls of Sarch Vorn. You shoul…
Goldberry can be found in Sarch Vorn. After banishing the Grey Fear, you discovered that Goldberry also travelled to Sarch Vorn. You should talk to Go…
Gorwen can be found in Sarch Vorn. After encountering Goldberry in the depths of Sarch Vorn, you have seen Luilloth's remains laid to rest at last. Yo…
You have triumphed over the Grey Fear and laid Luilloth's remains to rest in Sarch Vorn. You should now return to Rhiangar. Rhiangar is at the inn in …
